title: scleria subulata
intro: Scleria subulata, also known as the needle sedge, is a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting digestive health, among others. The needle sedge can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
